'''Sarm''' was a yellow [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] which had been inhabited by an [[Unidentified Sarm species|unknown species]] which built a vast irrigation canal network across the planet. When the [[Utegetu Nebula/Legends|Utegetu Nebula]] erupted, however, it scoured the planet clean of its population, leaving only the canal network behind. The [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] fleet would later mass above it, setting the stage for the [[Battle of Sarm]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1st}}
